indications.text:
MAXALT® and MAXALT-MLT® are indicated for the acute treatment of migraine with or without aura
in adults and in pediatric patients 6 to 17 years old.
Limitations of Use
 MAXALT should only be used where a clear diagnosis of migraine has been established. If a patient
has no response for the first m...

MAXALT is indicated for the acute treatment of migraine attacks with or without aura in adults.
MAXALT is not intended for the prophylactic therapy of migraine or for use in the management of
hemiplegic or basilar migraine (see CONTRAINDICATIONS). Safety and effectiveness of MAXALT have
not been est...
